zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Beatrix Chichele於1425年出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其時，她的父親John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London13歲，母親Margery Knollys49歲。她於1440年與William Peche在法國培結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在英國英格蘭肯特艾斯福德享年60歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Beatrix Chichele于1425年出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其时，她的父亲John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London13岁，母亲Margery Knollys49岁。她于1440年与William Peche在法国培结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在英国英格兰肯特艾斯福德享年60岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Beatrix Chichele was born in 1425, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, was 13 and her mother, Margery Knollys, was 49. She married William Peche in 1440, in Perche, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1485, in Eynsford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Beatrix Chichele est née en 1425, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Margery Knollys, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé William Peche en 1440, à Perche, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1485, à Eynsford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Beatrix Chichele 1425 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London 13 und ihre Mutter Margery Knollys 49. Sie hat 1440 in Perche, Frankreich William Peche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Eynsford, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Beatrix Chichele è nata il nel 1425 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Margery Knollys, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato William Peche nel 1440, nel Perche, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1485, nel Eynsford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Beatrix Chicheleが1425年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of Londonは13歳，母Margery Knollysは49歳であった。1440年にフランスペルチェでWilliam Pecheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年にイギリスイギリスケントエインスフォードで60歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Beatrix Chichele(이)가 1425년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Knollys(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1440년 프랑스 퍼체에서 William Peche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 히그함 페레르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Beatrix Chichele nasceu em 1425, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Margery Knollys, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com William Peche em 1440, em Perche, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1485, em Eynsford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Beatrix Chichele родилась в 1425 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Knollys, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Peche в 1440 г. в местности пирч, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1485 г. в местности эинсфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Beatrix Chichele nació en 1425, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Margery Knollys, tenía 49 años. Se casó con William Peche en 1440, en Perche, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1485, en Eynsford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
